name: pdf-extract-review
description: Structure and review a PDF text extract (run --pdf first or paste text) — skill pdf-render

steps.text: Prefer: python fable5_offline_agent.py --pdf file.pdf  then this workflow. Image-only pages need OCR.

steps.goal: Using skill pdf-render and any PDF extract text in the prompt or knowledge/pdf/, produce: (1) verdict on text-layer quality (2) document type guess with confidence (3) structured outline (4) key claims/numbers with re-derive where needed (5) gaps/ocr needs (6) recommended next domain skill (legal, education, urban, privacy). Do not invent text not in the extract.
criteria: Source and extract method stated or marked unknown
Next domain skill or action named
Quantitative claims flagged for re-derive if present
